articles.title: Departed Evmos co-founder sells thousands of tokens, the team claims
articles.description: Evmos co-founder Akash Khosla allegedly sold large amounts of the project’s native token after his exit from the project, the team claimed.

articles.title: Ex-Ripple Exec On Why SEC Might Still Defeat Ripple In XRP Lawsuit Amid Unmasking Of Hinman Docs
articles.description: A former executive at Ripple believes that despite the odds tilting in the blockchain payments firm’s favor, the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) could still win the legal battle.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin urges caution when it comes to re-staking on Ethereum
articles.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin expressed concerns about overcomplicating the Ethereum consensus mechanism beyond its original design.
